title: Elliptic systems of pseudodifferential equations in a refined scale on a   closed manifold
summary:
We study a system of pseudodifferential equations that is elliptic in the
sense of Petrovskii on a closed compact smooth manifold. We prove that the
operator generated by the system is Fredholm one on a refined two-sided scale
of the functional Hilbert spaces. Elements of this scale are the special
isotropic spaces of H\"{o}rmander--Volevich--Paneah.

title: Interpolation with a function parameter and refined scale of spaces
summary:
The interpolation of couples of separable Hilbert spaces with a function
parameter is studied. The main properties of the classic interpolation are
proved. Some applications to the interpolation of isotropic H\"ormander spaces
over a closed manifold are given.

title: Regular elliptic boundary-value problem in a two-sided refined scale of   spaces
summary:
A regular elliptic boundary-value problem over a bounded domain with a smooth
boundary is studied. We prove that the operator of this problem is a Fredholm
one in the two-sided refined scale of the functional Hilbert spaces and
generates a complete collection of isomorphisms. Elements of this scale are the
isotropic spaces of Hormander-Volevich-Paneah and some its modifications. A
priori estimate for the solution is established and its regularity is
investigated.
